sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25097" key="diakwphlate/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διακωπηλᾰτέω</orth>, <sense id="n25097.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">gloss on </lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">διερέττοντα</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διακωχή</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">διοκωχή.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
